name: AlternativeExpression
title: Alternative Expression
description: Provides an alternate expression containing the compiled JSON ELM for an expression. (NOTE: The expectation is that this extension will transition to the core extensions pack)

element.definition: Provides an alternate expression containing the compiled JSON ELM for an expression. (NOTE: The expectation is that this extension will transition to the core extensions pack)

element.short: Alternate expression containing compiled JSON ELM.
